mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prd_bom (id, bom_code, bom_name, product_id, product_code, product_name, spec, unit_id, unit_name, version, base_qty, output_qty, loss_rate, is_default, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{bomCode}, #{bomName}, #{productId}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{spec}, #{unitId}, #{unitName}, #{version}, #{baseQty}, #{outputQty}, #{lossRate}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
